message.content:
# QA Analysis: Hayat Life Care Investment Section

## 1. Visual/Layout Issues
- The three testimonial cards appear well-aligned in a row, but the "Health Tips & Insights" section below seems disconnected from the testimonials
- The floating action buttons (chat, share, scroll-to-top) on the right side are positioned correctly but may interfere with content readability on smaller screens
- No obvious layout inconsistencies or broken elements visible

## 2. Text Readability
- Testimonial text is legible but the quotes are quite long - may be difficult to scan quickly
- The "Health Tips & Insights" heading is clear and properly sized
- Subheading text appears appropriately sized for readability

## 3. Spacing Problems
- Good spacing between testimonial cards (approximately 20-30px)
- Adequate padding within each testimonial card
- The gap between the testimonials section and the "Health Tips & Insights" section appears generous (approximately 60-80px)
- No obvious spacing inconsistencies

## 4. Color Contrast Issues
- The green accent color (for icons and buttons) contrasts well with the white background
- Text appears to have sufficient contrast against background
- No obvious color contrast violations visible

## 5. Truncation or Overflow
- No text truncation visible in the testimonials
- All text appears to fit within its containers
- No overflow issues detected in the visible portion

## Additional Notes
- The "Investment" navigation item in the header is properly highlighted/active
- The overall layout appears responsive and well-structured
- No obvious visual bugs or rendering issues detected
